SEARCH
Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.event

Class PublishDelegateParseListener

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.bpmn.parser.AbstractBpmnParseListener
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.spring.boot.starter.event.PublishDelegateParseListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.bpmn.parser.BpmnParseListener
public class PublishDelegateParseListener extends org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.bpmn.parser.AbstractBpmnParseListener
Parse listener adding provided execution and task listeners.
